Acta v0.2.0 record · Generated from accepted canonical state (figures/sheet-slug.md) after explicit acceptance (chat — per-figure verdicts confirmed) · Never generated from browser state.

checklist record · ACCEPTED

Accepted figure sheet

One paragraph: which figures were approved and which return for revision.

Sheet verdicts

Decision figure-sheet

One paragraph: which figures were approved and which return for revision.

Rationale: The honest sheet verdict.. Accepted via chat — explicit confirmation.

Figures

01An authored figure Approve

Three boxes in a row — the URL parameter, the pure functions, and the catalog DOM — connected by two arrows; the pure middle box is emphasized.

The whole feature is one left-to-right sentence: URL in, pure functions, DOM out.

SVG source 
<svg viewBox="0 0 640 180" role="img" aria-labelledby="fig-t-fig-example fig-d-fig-example" class="a2-figure">
<title id="fig-t-fig-example">Tag filtering: URL to DOM</title>
<desc id="fig-d-fig-example">Three boxes in a row — the URL parameter, the pure functions, and the catalog DOM — connected by two arrows; the pure middle box is emphasized.</desc>
<rect x="24" y="58" width="168" height="64" rx="12" fill="var(--acta-paper)" stroke="var(--acta-rule-strong)" stroke-width="1.5"></rect>
<text x="108" y="85" font-size="13" font-weight="600" text-anchor="middle" fill="var(--acta-ink)">?tag=git</text>
<text x="108" y="103" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle" fill="var(--acta-ink-muted)">the only state</text>
<polyline points="192,90 232,90" fill="none" stroke="var(--acta-rule-strong)" stroke-width="1.5"></polyline>
<polygon points="239,90 229,85 229,95" fill="var(--acta-rule-strong)"></polygon>
<rect x="240" y="46" width="176" height="88" rx="12" fill="var(--acta-action-tint)" stroke="var(--acta-action)" stroke-width="1.5"></rect>
<text x="328" y="78" font-size="13" font-weight="600" text-anchor="middle" fill="var(--acta-ink)">parse → filter</text>
<text x="328" y="96" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle" fill="var(--acta-ink-muted)">pure functions</text>
<text x="328" y="114" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle" fill="var(--acta-ink-muted)">tested in Node</text>
<polyline points="416,90 456,90" fill="none" stroke="var(--acta-rule-strong)" stroke-width="1.5"></polyline>
<polygon points="463,90 453,85 453,95" fill="var(--acta-rule-strong)"></polygon>
<rect x="464" y="58" width="152" height="64" rx="12" fill="#22252B" stroke="#22252B" stroke-width="1.5"></rect>
<text x="540" y="85" font-size="13" font-weight="600" text-anchor="middle" fill="#E7E5DE">catalog DOM</text>
<text x="540" y="103" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle" fill="#9DA2AC">replaceChildren</text>
<text x="24" y="30" font-size="11" fill="var(--acta-ink-muted)">every navigation, including back/forward, replays this line</text>
</svg>

Sources

  1. [E1] the records or documents the figures illustrate

Acta is a print-first engineering record. Fact = directly supported; Inference = reasoned from evidence; Simplification = deliberately reduced model. This record renders accepted canonical state only; open decisions live in the companion instrument.
